activities_projects.title: Main Characters List
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters in the story
steps: Read the lesson carefully
List the main characters mentioned in the story
Write one sentence about each character

activities_projects.title: The Kingdom’s Strange Rules
activities_projects.objective: Understand the unusual rules in the kingdom
steps: Read the beginning of the lesson
Write two strange rules made by the king and the minister
Explain them in 3–4 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the setting of the story

activities_projects.title: Guru and Disciple
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of the guru and the disciple
steps: Read the part where the guru and disciple arrive in the city
Write 3–4 sentences describing their reactions to the kingdom

activities_projects.title: Reason for the Disciple Staying
activities_projects.objective: Understand why the disciple stayed in the kingdom
steps: Identify why the disciple refused to leave the kingdom
Write the reason in 3–4 sentences

activities_projects.title: Chain of Blame
steps: Read the court scene carefully
List the people who were blamed for the thief’s death
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands cause and effect in the story

activities_projects.title: The Guru’s Wisdom
activities_projects.objective: Understand the wisdom of the guru
steps: Find the advice the guru gave to the disciple
Write it in your own words in 3–4 sentences

activities_projects.title: How the Guru Saved the Disciple
activities_projects.objective: Understand the clever trick used by the guru
steps: Read the part where the guru returns
Write how he tricked the king and minister

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
steps: Identify four important events in the story
Write them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the lesson of the story
steps: Think about what the story teaches us
Write the moral in your own words

activities_projects.title: Changes in the Kingdom
activities_projects.objective: Understand the ending of the story
steps: Read the final part of the lesson
Write what changes the guru and disciple made in the kingdom
